title: Summer_Heart_Clay_Tether
shortDesc: Summer made this when we were at the park.

title: Micayla_IceCream_Clay_Tether
shortDesc: Micayla made this when we were at the park.

title: Ever_Figurine_Clay_Tether
shortDesc: Ever made a green figurine for Six's Nostalgia playdate at my house.

title: Wilson_BotanicalGarden_Rock_Tether
shortDesc: Wilson and I went on a date to the Botanical Garden. I picked up a rock from the Bonsai Collection.

title: Friends_28thBirthday_Home_CollaborativeDrawing
shortDesc: My 28th birthday party. A collaborative drawing on my studio wall.
longDesc: I layed out this piece of paper on my studio wall and invited friends to collaborate. This was the night I met Elia and Niels, it was a really lovely and important moment. They came to my door and I immediately felt their warmth. I asked my friends to bring a twig as an entry fee, and without even knowing me they abided by my silly rule. I love when I meet people that can commit to a creative bit and suspend a little bit of disbelief.

title: Hackers_connectedmatterEd1_CollaborativeDrawing
shortDesc: Collaborative drawing as part of our debut Edition 01, Suck My Code: Cyborgs and Sex.
longDesc: A big piece of paper was laid out as an optional encouraged activity with a cup full of sharpened colored pencils on a pedestal next to it.

title: Dad_MetalProject_Clock
shortDesc: Dad's unfinished clock he made when he was my age.
longDesc: I never knew he had made anything like this. It's fitting to be in the middle of understanding my own relationship to time, perfectionism, unfinished projects, and commitment. I miss him.

title: Dad_HouseItem_Box
shortDesc: Dad's leather box from his home. I keep his metal projects and unfinished jewelry pieces inside.
longDesc: I keep his metal projects and unfinished jewelry pieces he made when he was my age in here.

title: Friends_ParkRitual_FortGreene_CollectiveMap
shortDesc: I invited several loved ones to join me for a park ritual.

title: Friends_MindMapDay_Memory
shortDesc: Six, Diana, and Sylvia came over and we mind mapped. Things that came up were echoes.

title: Buzz_RuthPaperBag_Tether
shortDesc: We met via Facebook Marketplace. I bought an antique rotating date and time clock from him.
longDesc: He was giving away his late mother's estate for years. We spoke for an hour about archiving, history, grief, and loss. I asked him if he regretted giving anything away and he said no, quite definitively. To him, photographs held the most value. His Mom's name was Ruth. He gave me the clock inside the paper bag.

title: Brandon_Flower_Clay_Tether
shortDesc: Brandon made this after our Birthday trip. I wouldn't let him throw it out.

title: Lauve_Letter_Tether
shortDesc: Lauve left me this letter after we house swapped.
longDesc: She was so sweet, kind, and considerate. It was great getting to know her better.

title: Diana_Dragonfruit_Tether
shortDesc: A dragonfruit Diana gave me after we hosted our dinner party.

title: Wilson_Leaf_Clay_Tether
shortDesc: Wilson made this leaf out of clay. He was really focused.
